pickup.name: Prism of Pure Sight
pickup.effect: Reveals invisible paths and enemy weak points.

encounters.trigger: Opening the Gate of Dawn reveals the path to the Silver Orchard.

pickup.name: Celestial Censer
pickup.effect: Emits a calming smoke that dispels shadow miasma.

encounters.trigger: Cleansing the orchard opens the bridge to the Astral Sanctum.

pickup.name: Aurelian Essence
pickup.effect: Infuses the player with permanent golden radiance.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Cherub unlocks the portal to the Star Throne.

boss.name: The Fallen Architect
boss.victory_condition: Channel the Aurelian Essence into the Architect's core to restore his divinity.

output.objective: Restore harmony to the celestial realm by purging the encroaching void.
output.reward: The Title of Sun-Bearer and the Aegis of Eternity.

output.setting: An unstable, fractured starship bridge drifting through a nebula of sentient plasma.

pickup.name: Ionic Soldering Lead
pickup.effect: Adds electrical conductivity to kinetic strikes

encounters.trigger: Opening the main hatch causes a power surge toward the Engine Room.

pickup.name: Void Sealant Spray
pickup.effect: Hardens into a crystalline barrier upon contact with heat

encounters.trigger: Rerouting the fuel lines stabilizes the gravity well at the Command Deck.

pickup.name: Resonance Oscillator
pickup.effect: Emits a high-frequency vibration that disrupts energy shields

encounters.trigger: Disabling the emergency siren unlocks the final boss door.

boss.name: The Solar Architect
boss.victory_condition: Disrupt the Architect's shield core to force a total system reboot.

output.objective: Navigate the collapsing vessel to manually override the self-destruct sequence.
output.reward: Master Engineer's Celestial Toolset and the 'Star-Saver' achievement.

output.setting: High-security server farm of the Kuro-Tek Megacorporation

pickup.name: Encrypted Keycard
pickup.effect: Unlocks the primary cooling chamber

encounters.trigger: Scanning the keycard at the terminal opens the heavy blast doors to the Cooling Hub.

pickup.name: EMP Burst Module
pickup.effect: Modifies the Arc Welder to emit a short-range electromagnetic pulse

encounters.trigger: Depleting the Riot Unit's health triggers a system-wide lockdown, revealing the Mainframe Bridge.

pickup.name: Logic Virus Injector
pickup.effect: Instantly bypasses firewall defenses when manually uploaded

encounters.trigger: The defeat of Kaelen causes the Core Processor to emerge from the floor for the final confrontation.

boss.name: The Central Intelligence AI
boss.victory_condition: Inject the virus while the AI shields are down during its reload cycle

output.objective: Infiltrate the Kuro-Tek core and upload the Logic Virus to disable the city-wide surveillance grid.
